headings: (c) All of that property located at 789 Some Street, Bryan, TX 77801
text: - (b) The Subcontractor shall abide by all relevant state and federal laws and local ordinances and shall, within forty-eight (48) hours of receipt of a request by the Contractor, provide the Contractor with proof of compliance with such laws and ordinances, including but not limited to, proof that all employees in the Subcontractor's employ, or in the employ of a sub-Subcontractor, have submitted to their employer I-9s demonstrating they are eligible to work lawfully in the United States and are covered by current Workers' Compensation insurance policies.
